title: Bug report: under some conditions, 0**0 still gives 0

features.name: power operator with zero constant base and concatenation exponent
features.description: Code should include a power operator (**) with a zero constant base (like 12'h000) and a concatenation expression as the exponent
features.snippet: assign r = 12'h000 ** { a, b, c, d, e[5] };
